chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 624 of 2025 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on CMA No.6055/2025. 2. For orders on office objections No.1 & 22. 3. For orders on CMA No.3334/2025. 4. For hearing of main case. 21.03.2025 Mr. Chanzeb, advocate for the petitioners. 1. Urgency granted. 3. Exemption granted subject to all just exceptions. 2&4. 45 petitioners have filed this petition seeking employment as teacher in Government of Sindh on the basis of recruitment process stated to have been concluded in 2021. Petition has been filed in 2025, therefore, petition, prima facie, barred by laches. Furthermore, learned counsel states that recruitment process has been concluded and successful candidates have also been appointed, however, not a single one is impleaded herein. Petition is found to be mis-conceived, hence dismissed in limine. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
